name: Chocolate Surprise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg and cocoa powder until well combined.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt) into a separate bowl. Gradually add the dry mixture to the chocolate mixture alternately with milk, stirring after each addition until just mixed.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract, chopped walnuts, and peanut butter chips until evenly distributed.
5. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 8-10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely. Frost with icing if desired.
